prestazioni: N52B30 3.0L naturally aspirated inline-6 engine: Full bolt-on package with a Schrick 264/260° camshaft upgrade (intake/exhaust), custom 3.5" equal-length stainless steel headers by Supersprint, and a Gruppe M Ram Air intake system with a carbon fiber velocity stack for optimized airflow at high RPM (7,000+ RPM redline capable).

Engine management: Megasquirt MS3Pro PNP standalone ECU with a custom 24x crank trigger wheel and sequential fuel injection, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0280158002 1,000cc high-impedance injector set for precise fuel delivery under aggressive ignition timing (22° BTDC base timing).

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2-way) with 85% lockup under power, mated to a Getrag GS6-53BZ 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Fidanza aluminum flywheel (11.8 lbs) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (400 Nm torque capacity) for rapid gear engagement and durability under track use.
estetica: Carbon fiber front splitter by Vorsteiner (E81-specific, 3-piece design with adjustable dive planes), paired with a custom rear diffuser by 3D Design Japan (polyurethane construction, 4x100mm exhaust cutouts for the Supersprint headers).

OEM+ widebody conversion using genuine BMW E87 LCI fenders (flared 20mm per side) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, retaining the stock E81 hood but adding a functional carbon fiber NACA duct for brake cooling (routed to AP Racing 6-piston calipers).

Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (E81-specific mounting brackets, H-pattern harness slots) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, M-Tech II steering wheel (Nappa leather with red stitching, 380mm diameter), and a custom roll cage by Wiechers Sport (bolt-in, 6-point, T45 steel with gusseted joints for chassis rigidity).
